title: angianthus micropodioides var. filaginoides
intro: Angianthus micropodioides var. filaginoides, also known as the bushy button or small button bush, is a plant species native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with indigestion and bloating. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive function, and supporting the immune system. Bushy button can be used in teas, infusions, or as a dried herb for its medicinal and health benefits.
